前線基地に新しく出来た、謎の美女が営む酒場。<br>その噂を聞きつけたベリサが、:
At the Frontline Base, a tavern run by a mysterious beauty had
recently opened. Having heard the rumors, Verisa peered in, sizing up the place.
あら、可愛い炎の魔法使いさんじゃない。<br>ウチのお店に興味あるの？: Oh my, aren't you a cute fire mage? Are you interested in my shop?
か、可愛いっ！？ あ、えっとぉ～……<br>おにーさんがオーナーだって話だったん:
C-cute! Ah, umm... I heard big bro is the Owner, so I just came to
check it out...
ところで、あなた……。<br>ひょっとして、何か、壁にぶつかったりしてない？: By the way, you... haven't you hit some kind of wall?
え？ 壁に……！？<br>いやいやいやぁ～、天才魔法使いベリサちゃんはいつでも絶:
Huh? A wall...? No, no, no! This Genius Mage Verisa is always in top
form, you know!
そうかしら？ 私には、あなたはまだまだ伸びしろがあるように思うわ。<br>まだ力:
Is that right? I think you still have plenty of potential. Perhaps you
haven't fully tapped into your power yet...
もしも、今よりも更に強くなる方法があるとしたら、どうします？<br>しかも、長い:
What if there were a way to become even stronger? And in a much
shorter time than years of training...
え、えっと～……その方法次第って感じかな？: U-umm... I guess it depends on the method?
その方法はね。<br>このお店で働くことよ。: The method is to work at this shop.
へっ！？<br>お店で働くだけ！？: Huh! Just working at the shop!
あなたみたいに可愛い子が働いてくれるなら、私は大歓迎よ♪<br>そうだ！ あなた:
If a cute girl like you were to work here, I'd be thrilled! Oh, right! I
even have an outfit that would look great on you! Want to try it on?
結局、『可愛い』って言葉に負けて、<br>働くことになっちゃった……: In the end, the word "cute" got me, and now I'm working here...
（な、なんなの、このお姉さん……<br>実は、こう見えて、ものすごい大魔道士でし:
(What's with this lady...? I wonder if she's actually a super great
archmage or something?)
お前なぁ～、ルディアに簡単に言いくるめられ過ぎだろ……<br>本当に働く気なのか:
Hey, come on, you're too easily swayed by Ludia... Are you really
going to work there?
ふふふっ……ど～ぉ、おにーさん？<br>可愛いでしょ～？: Fufufu... How about it, big bro? Cute, isn't it?
娼館衣装に着替えたベリサが、楽しそうにクルクルと回っている。<br>可愛いのはも:
Verisa, now dressed in her brothel outfit, twirled around happily. She
looked cute, of course, but what really caught my eye was her defenselessly exposed skin.
あはっ♪ おにーさんってば見惚れすぎ～♡<br>きゃー、襲われる～～♪ 誰か助け:
Ahah! Mister's staring too much!♡ Kyaa, I'm being attacked!♪
Somebody help!♪
お前なぁ～、分かってるのか？<br>この店がどういうことをする店なのか。: Hey, do you even understand what kind of shop this is?
心配しなくてもだいじょーぶっ♪<br>事情は聞いたし、ここで働けば、パワーアップ:
Don't worry, it's totally fine!♪ I heard all about it. If I work here, I
can power up, right?
ルディア……本当に、<br>この店で働くだけでこいつの能力が目覚めるのか？: Ludia... really? Just by working here, her abilities will awaken?
フフッ、今に分かるわ。<br>本当の強さは、戦場で生まれるとは限らないのよ、司令:
Fufu, you'll soon understand. True strength isn't always forged on
the battlefield, Commander.
こちらの躊躇いを吹き飛ばすように、ベリサは無邪気に手を振り、<br>軽やかな足取: As if to sweep away our hesitation, Verisa waved cheerfully and ran up the stairs with a light step.
その背中は、これから個室で見知らぬ客の相手をするとは<br>微塵も感じさせないほ: Her back, as she walked away, was so bright and cheerful that it gave no hint that she was about to entertain a stranger in a private room.
